question: What are the owners of the document objects described as the 'Braeden Collection'?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Document_Objects.Owner FROM Document_Objects JOIN Documents_in_Collections ON Document_Objects.Document_Object_ID = Documents_in_Collections.Document_Object_ID JOIN Collections ON Documents_in_Collections.Collection_ID = Collections.Collection_ID WHERE Collections.Collection_Name = 'Braeden Collection';

back_translation.intent: 获取所有属于'Braeden Collection'的文档对象的所有者

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题询问属于'Braeden Collection'的文档对象的所有者，SQL描述准确匹配了该意图，通过Collections表的过滤条件正确关联到Document_Objects表，并选择所需Owner列，未使用聚合、分组、排序或限制。
